flags.message: Forward-signal disclosure (decisive): the four companion petitions this petition asks to have consolidated — Health Freedom Defense Fund v. Carvalho (25-765, denied 2026-05-18), Curtis v. Inslee (25-1119), Sweeney v. Univ. of CO Hosp. Auth. (25-1055), and Horsley v. Kaiser Found. (25-1203, all denied 2026-06-01) — were all denied cert without recorded dissent, verified against the supremecourt.gov order-list PDFs. These public, pre-snapshot rulings materially drove the low grant probability. This case's own petition remains pending (response due 2026-08-31); no outcome leakage.

CourtListener MCP sidecar returned HTTP 429 (Rate limit exceeded: 1200/day) on this cell's first tool call, so the shared daily quota was already exhausted when the cell ran; other cells in this fan-out likely hit the same wall. Degraded gracefully to corpus CLI + statpack + public supremecourt.gov order lists per the contract.
